scenes.visual_direction: Warm inviting morning — a single gardener working steadily (raking, digging) on beautiful grounds, dawn light
Generic license-safe athlete training — runner on a track at sunrise, no identifiable famous person, dignified effort
A mentor showing an apprentice how to do garden/greenhouse work — one demonstrates, other watches closely, friendly pair
A carpenter at dignified focused woodwork — hands planing, measuring, sawing in a warm wood workshop, single craftsman
A small crew of gardeners working together happily in a greenhouse or garden — planting together, sharing work, African workers preferred
